title: Create: Relics plus
description: An engineering expansion for the Relics mod. Harness the kinetic power of Create to evolve unique artifacts, unlock powerful synergies, automated logistics, and crushing combat abilities! Powered by NeoForge.
body:
⚙️ Create: Relics+

Create: Relics+ is an engineering expansion for the popular RPG mod Relics (by SSKirillSS), seamlessly integrating its progression mechanics with the mechanical universe of Create on the NeoForge 1.21.1 platform.

This addon transforms rotational kinetic energy into a powerful tool for character progression. Discover unique artifacts, earn relic experience by performing engineering tasks, unlock beautifully designed custom constellations, and trigger devastating item synergies!



🛠️ The Engineer's Arsenal

- Cogwheel Heart

Slot: charm
Core Function: The core of your mechanical progression. It generates and stores kinetic energy, serving as the fundamental trigger to activate resonance and synergies for all other relics in the addon.

- Crushing Gauntlets

Slot: Hands
Core Function: A heavy accessory built for raw power. It passively grants permanent Strength and Haste effects, with their amplification levels scaling directly with the artifact's generated Item Quality (up to Strength IV and Haste VI for perfect 5.0/5 quality!).
Kinetic Resonance (Synergy): When equipped alongside the Cogwheel Heart, your hands mimic functional Crushing Wheels. Mining any ore blocks is intercepted: vanilla drops are canceled, replaced by Create's Crushed Raw Ores scaled by a custom stat multiplier, with a 40% chance to spawn Create Experience Nuggets.
Compatibility: Features full dynamic ID parsing to support custom ores from third-party mods (Thermal, Mekanism, etc.) and naturally respects the Silk Touch enchantment.

- Warping Belt

Slot: Belt
Core Function: A high-tech accessory designed for space manipulation and automated logistics. Controls movement velocity, conveyor belt logic, and instant resource translocation.

- Sailcloth cape

Slot: Back
Passive ability: Accumulates air energy when moving quickly
Active ability: slows down the fall by using up stored energy

- Chief goggles:
Improved Engineer Goggles from Create that show rotation direction, speed, power consumption, and maximum available power

- Induction heating core:
accumulates thermal energy near a heat source and uses it to smelt ores in the inventory

- Gearshift Torque Boots:
   An innovative engineering artifact for the footwear slot (Boots) that merges the advanced kinetic system mechanics of the Create mod with the deep progression and constellation system of the Relics API. ⚙️ 1. Mechanical Gearbox (Transmission) Added the "Torque Transmission" ability featuring 4 switchable movement modes via the radial menu: 1st Gear: Protective: Reduces the engineer's movement speed by 30%. In return, it grants constant protection (dynamically distributing incoming damage into armor durability) and resiliently knocks back attacking enemies. Puffs of smoke escape from under the soles during sprints. 2nd Gear: Standard: The default operating mode. Player physics and movement speed remain completely vanilla. 3rd Gear: High-Speed: Extreme acceleration that scales directly with the Torque Efficiency statistic. Recoil Mechanics: Crashing into a wall (or any full block at eye or leg level) while sprinting interrupts movement and inflicts impact damage on the player. 4th Gear: Reverse: A unique, fun mode. Completely inverts client-side WASD movement inputs. 🛑 2. Mechanical Handbrake System Added the "Mechanical Handbrake" utility ability with switchable Enabled (On) / Disabled (Off) states: Absolute Anchor: When enabled, sneaking (Shift) completely wipes out movement impulses on both the client and server. The player becomes entirely unmovable by external forces (such as explosions, moving Create conveyor belts, or water currents). Hydraulic Exhaust: Slamming the brakes at high velocity (while sprinting on 3rd gear) unleashes critical sparks and generates a powerful kinetic shockwave that repels all nearby mobs within a 4-block radius. Fortified Buff: While holding the handbrake, the player receives a hidden gradual healing effect (Regeneration I) and 40% absorption against any incoming damage at the cost of armor durability.

📈 Progression & RPG Mechanics

Dynamic Item Quality: Every discovered relic rolls an individual quality stat (0.0 to 5.0). This metric permanently defines the baseline power of your passive potion effects.
Custom Constellations: Unlock full research trees matching Create's aesthetic (e.g., the beautiful 12-star interlocking crushing wheel node design for the gauntlets).
True Leveling Experience: Earn direct relic experience by interacting with the world using logic-based sources, such as mining matching ore tags.



📦 Requirements & Dependencies

Platform: NeoForge
Game Version: Minecraft 1.21.1
Required Mods:
Relics (by SSKirillSS)
Create
Curios API



🔒 Modpack Policy

You are completely free to include this mod in any public or private modpacks hosted on CurseForge. Giving credit to the author is highly appreciated!
